chosen_action.title: Refresh stale latest truth aliases from current execution-board state

why_this_action.summary: distribution_lane_latest.json and outcome_execution_board_latest.json had drifted behind the current 2026-05-26 hold-window truth, so I refreshed the shared latest aliases from the current selector state and the already-executed repair instead of fabricating another lane.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
apollo_status.json: managed outbound is authenticated and available for execution packaging
distribution_lane_latest.json: stale 2026-05-25 latest alias before refresh
outcome_execution_board_latest.json: stale 2026-05-25 runner status before refresh
marketing_2026-05-26_distribution_architecture_repair_execution.json: freshest executed same-window repair to reuse
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: freshest Reddit activity already logged; no need to spend this slot on another Reddit packet
